title: Yelanon Non Slip Furniture Pads 38pcs（25+50+75) mm Furniture Grippers, Non Skid Self Adhesive Rubber Feet Furniture Feet,Anti Slide Furniture Hardwood Floor Protector for Keep Couch Stoppers
features: BEST PROTECTION＆ANTI SCRATCH - Place our non slip furniture pads on the legs of your furniture, including couch,beds, tables, chairs, sofas and appliances to provide the best protection for your hardwood floors,wood, laminate or tile floor. And you never have to hear that annoying scraping noise again.

MIGHTY GRIP THAT WONT SLIP – No-slip pads: 20pcs 1"round;18pcs 2"round；9pcs 3"round. Furniture Grippers by Slip stick are the universal solution to stop unwanted movement or sliding of furniture / objects and effectively protect hard surfaces from scratches or damage

EXTRA-STRONG ADHESIVE - We professionally designed and produce self-stick rubber pads for chair legs and other furniture. Yelanon anti scratch furniture pads made of high-density felt that keeps the non skid furniture pads in place firmly and last longer.

NO TOOLS NECESSARY - Self Stick floor protectors for furniture legs can quickly be applied at the first sign of friction with the floor or table top. Please clean up chair legs and other furniture feet before stick no slip furniture pads for best effect.

YELANON IS A REGISTERED TRADEMARK - We take pride in providing the highest quality and most durable Non Slip Furniture Pads on the market . We are happy to guarantee our product. and friendly customer service.
description: From the manufacturer SAVE MONEY AND ENERGY YOU SPEND TO PROTECT THESE WITH OUR FURNITURE PADS. Anti Skid Furniture Pads for hardwood floors Yelanon does keep the furniture feet from sliding around the floors, forget about scratches in your lovely home. You definitely need these 38 pcs 1"+ 2"+ 3" Furniture Pads! WHAT DO YELANON RUBBER FURNITURE PADS DO FOR YOUR HOME? DIVERSITY SIZES - Best protection for hardwood floors are perfect for any type of furniture - dining chairs, table, cabinet, stools. EFFECTIVE PADS- No more the annoying scraping sound of a chair or moving furniture is pushed against the hard floor help you to reduce noise. TENACIOUS ADHESIVE - Our furniture grippers have strong adhesive which does not allow them to come off and tightly hold the pads for months. ANTI SLIDE - Just have these self-adhesive furniture pads which make your daily life without any potential floor(wooden, tiled, laminate) damage risks. 38 pcs Round PREMIUM FURNITURE GRIPS SUITABLE FOR ANY LIGHT FURNITURE! 1 Inch Small Floor Protectors - for dining chairs, table, cabinet, stools/ small vase, plant pot/ other items. 2 Inch Medium Grippers - for bed/ heavy furniture/ couch feet. 3 Inch Large Furniture Pad - for dresser/ cabinet/ cut out the shape and size you need. Yelanon is committed to household products, YELANON products focus on home protection, quality, practicality. Just keeping a sedate and beautiful homeland for you. Please clean the surface of the object. Then peel the felt pad from the paper and put it on the object. Our non slip furniture pads & protectors have the tenacious adhesive which tightly holds pads on the furniture for a long period of time. Protect the floor you love from scratches and scuffs when you move chairs,table,couch to clean the flooring. Anti Skid Furniture Grippers Protectors for all types of the floors, Protect Hardwood Tile Wood Floors & Laminate Flooring
